name: @epicenter/local-books
description: Headless CLI that mirrors QuickBooks Online into a local SQLite database via full pull + incremental CDC.

scripts.auth:sandbox: infisical run --project-config-dir=. --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts auth --qb-env sandbox
scripts.auth:production: infisical run --project-config-dir=. --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts auth --qb-env production
scripts.sync:sandbox: infisical run --project-config-dir=. --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts sync --qb-env sandbox
scripts.sync:production: infisical run --project-config-dir=. --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts sync --qb-env production
scripts.status:sandbox: infisical run --project-config-dir=. --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts status --qb-env sandbox
scripts.status:production: infisical run --project-config-dir=. --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts status --qb-env production
